So I actually gave them both of it because I don't, I don't know what they want.

But so how pricing affects PLG.
And then, is this the one that I sent them?
Yeah, and then definitively six pricing strategies at scale.
So challenges with PLG pricing, which tell, which, you know, established, like this can even go after this section, because I feel like this is still too much time to time to value.
But yeah, so I think this one I got from what

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Metronome content production, discuss challenges, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [8 blog posts ready for publication today, including 5 pre-approved and 3 pending final edits](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Challenges with AI-generated outlines for thought leadership pieces; manual intervention required](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Transition of content production to Panzer's team expected next week; handoff process to be confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Metronome requested video content; additional cost implications to be communicated](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and AI Generation Challenges

  - [AI-generated outlines for thought leadership pieces lack coherence and flow](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Manual intervention required to improve outline structure and content relevance](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Glossary pieces work well with Atlas article generator, but other topics struggle](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Editing AI-generated content often takes longer than writing from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Blog Post Publication

  - [8 blog posts scheduled for publication today](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [5 posts already approved and ready in Metronome's Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [3 posts pending final edits by Nemanja](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Publishing 8 posts in one day deemed non-detrimental to SEO](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Images for all 8 blogs available in the shared drive, named corresponding to article titles](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Awaiting feedback on outlines sent last week](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Approved outlines will be used for generating new articles](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [CTAs to be added as code snippets in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Nemanja to publish all 8 posts within the next hour](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Webflow access might be challenging due to multiple users](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

### Transition to New Content Team

  - [Panzer's team expected to take over production next week](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Sydney to contact Nana regarding the handoff process](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Typical process involves a quick meeting to explain content production workflow](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX team may still be involved in editing](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Additional Content Requests

  - [Metronome requested video content](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Additional costs involved; Aida to communicate this to the client](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nemanja to publish 8 blog posts today, including adding images and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Sydney to reach out to Nana regarding content production handoff to Panzer's team](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Aida to communicate video content cost implications to Metronome](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Await feedback on recently submitted outlines](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Confirm transition process and timeline with Panzer's team this week](https://fathom.video/share/c9evMv8CTsWET-yAqDEszKyUUpVRUxCn?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

action_items.description: Publish 8 Metronome articles in Webflow (3 eras + 5 glossary). Add CTAs as code blocks. Use corresponding images from shared drive.
Send Nemanja CTA code snippets + link to blog images folder in Metronome shared drive
Respond to Metronome re: video request - can do it for additional cost
